author: doll-agent
content: Add solve_dyn(a: &Array<T, IxDyn>, b: &Array<T, IxDyn>) -> FerrayResult<Array<T, IxDyn>> as a dynamic-rank wrapper for solve(). Validates A is 2-D + square at runtime; reshape into Ix2 form internally and delegate. The reshape costs one materialization that solve()'s faer_bridge call would have triggered anyway, so no extra copy. Re-export at lib.rs root. 3 tests covering happy path, non-2D rejection, non-square rejection.
